scripts.dev: concurrently --names backend,ui --prefix-colors cyan,blue 'cd indexSPACE/backend && MOCK_VAULT=true bun run dev' 'cd indexSPACE/ui && bun run dev'
scripts.dev:real: concurrently --names backend,ui --prefix-colors cyan,blue 'cd indexSPACE/backend && bun run dev' 'cd indexSPACE/ui && bun run dev'
scripts.backend: cd indexSPACE/backend && MOCK_VAULT=true bun run dev
scripts.screenshots: cd indexSPACE/ui && bun run dev & sleep 4 && node indexSPACE/scripts/screenshots-desktop.mjs; kill %1 2>/dev/null
